directions: Pour pretzels into a 9x13 pan.
Mix together the oil, dressing mix, cayenne and garlic powder.
Pour the mixture over the pretzels and mix to coat.
Bake at 225 for 2 hours, mixing every 30 minutes to evenly coat pretzels.

name: Martha Stewart Chicken in a Pot
directions: Wash and dry chicken.
Tie legs together with small piece of string.
Coat with butter or softened margarine.
Salt and pepper all over.
Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
Put in roasting pan, add wine and broth.
Roast at 450 for 30 minutes.
Cut leeks into 2 inch sections ( white and light green sections only) Rinse thoroughly.
Wash baby carrots, combine with leeks in large bowl.
salt and pepper liberally and toss with EVOO.
Add to roasting pan.
Return to 450 degree oven for 40 minutes.
Meanwhile, wash, cut and place potatoes in steamer basket with water, steam for 15 minutes or until potatoes are soft.
Serve sliced chicken, vegetables and potatoes with pan juices, with extra for dipping your Foreman grilled or broiled crusty bread into.

similar.name: Low Fat Chicken and Wild Rice Soup

name: Randi's Dill Pickles
directions: Wash the cucumbers and remove any stems.
Cut ends off, cut to hot dog condiment size.
Bring the white vinegar, water, salt and garlic cloves to a boil.  Boil for 2 minutes.
Add dill,  mustard seeds and cover pickles with brine. Let sit uncovered on counter for 2 days.  Stir occasionally.  (Can SUB dry mustard 2T and or dry dill 4T).
Fish out the garlic cloves, onion rings and dill with a slotted spoon, add equally into  each jar while the brine cools slightly.
Pour the hot brine into the jars and seal.
Process hot bath or store in Refrigerator.

name: Crudite With Olive-Creme Fraiche Dip
directions: In a mixing bowl, combine the olives, creme fraiche, and parsley and season with salt and pepper. Mix to combine, then transfer to a small dipping bowl.
Serve with an assortment of crudite, of your choice.
NOTE:
Use thyme, rosemary, chives or any other herb in place of parsley.

name: Crock Pot Chicken Cacciatore
directions: Place all the ingredients in a crock pot.
Cook on high for 4 hours.
Serve the chicken over whole wheat rotini pasta if desired.

similar.name: Slow Cooker Chicken, Tomato and White Bean Soup
Too Simple Chicken in Crock Pot

name: Slow Cooker Split Pea Soup
directions: Rinse the peas and pick through them for any pebbles or other things you don't want in your soup.
Combine all ingredients except kielbasa in slow cooker and cook on low for about 8-10 hours or on high for 4-6 hours.
Add kielbasa and more salt and pepper, if needed, to taste. Cook for an additional half hour.

similar.name: Slow Cooker Chicken, Tomato and White Bean Soup

name: Crock Pot Chicken Enchilada Soup
directions: Place all ingredients in crock pot and stir together.  Cook on high for 5 hours or low for 8 hours.
Remove chicken breasts, shred and return to the soup (using the paddle attachment in a standing mixer is a quick way to shred the chicken).

similar.name: Slow Cooker Chicken, Tomato and White Bean Soup

name: Oh Deer!
directions: Mix 2-3 Tbsp of Corn Syrup with equal parts Bbq Sauce in bowl. Dice up 1.5 small red or white onions. Take approximately 1/2 cup of Kraft Tex mex on side as well.
Take 4 eight inch Deer Sausage, cut them open, careful not to cut too far. Do this to each, and then fill the centre with diced onion.
Place on cooking sheet with wax paper.
preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Place sausages in Oven for about 10-15 minutes.
At that point, take them out of the oven, put 1-1 1/2 Tbsp of the corn syrup and bbq on each.
Put on one layer of cheese.
Put back in the oven for approximately another 30-40 minutes.

name: Smokey Juicy Burger Patties
directions: Combine all the ingredients together.
Form into 4 large patties.
Refrigerate patties for 4 hours or more to allow flavours to blend.
Grill on the BBQ until both sides are well charred.
Turn off the grill, close lid and allow to rest for 5 minutes.
OMG Enjoy!

name: OAMC Crockpot Meatball Vegetable Soup
directions: Combine all ingredients in gallon-sized freezer bag.
Prep: Thaw overnight in refrigerator. Add chicken broth to crockpot & cook on low 8 hours. Serve w/ crusty bread.

similar.name: Slow Cooker Chicken, Tomato and White Bean Soup

name: Creamy Swiss Chicken
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Pat chicken dry and place in greased 9x13 pan.
Add sliced cheese on top of chicken.
Mix mayonnaise, sour cream, 1/2 cup parmesan cheese, pepper, and garlic powder together.  Spread over chicken and cheese.
Sprinkle with the remaining parmesan cheese.
Bake for 1 hour.

name: Simple Crockpot Fiesta Chicken
directions: place all ingredients in your crockpot set to 4 hours on high. .
Once done cooking use forks to shred chicken.
Strain liquid to cook rice, quinoa, or dried beans inches.
put on tortillas, salad, or eat by itself.

similar.name: Super Easy Crock Pot Taco Soup
Slow Cooker Chicken, Tomato and White Bean Soup

name: Low Carb Meatloaf
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F. Grease a 9x5 in loaf pan and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except ketchup. Mix together until well incorporated, but don't overmix.
Transfer the mixture into the loaf pan. Bake for 30 minutes.

Spread the ketchup on top of the meatloaf (if using). Return to the oven and bake for 25-45 more minutes, until cooked through and internal temperature reaches 160 degrees F. (Time will vary depending on thickness of the loaf.).
